titleStmt.title: SII 6.1080: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1080. (A.R. No. 338 of 1899). IN THE SAME NICHE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīkāśavarṣē vasuviyadanalakṣmāmitē kāvyavā
rē caitryāmārādhanārtthaṁ harigirinṛharēranvahaṁ dhūpakālē .
śrīmāN sāmaṁtaśṛṁgārakavibhurakhilābhīṣṭasaṁsiddhayēdācchatrammālya
ṁ śubhaṁ cāmaramapi bhuvanakhyātakīrttipratāpaḥ . śrīśakavaruṣaṁbhulu 1308
gunēṁṭi caitra śudhdha paurnnamāsē śukravāramunāḍu jōgēśvarajīyana ko
ḍuku mahāpātrasāmaṁtaśriṁgāruḍu tanaku Abhīṣṭartthasiddhigānu śrīna
rasiṁhyanāthuniki nityamunnu koluvanu nibhaṁdālu nālu samarppiṁcenu I ko
lupulu koluvanu kūcibhaṭla koḍuku varadubhaṭlaku ṟēpaṭi dhūpananu
goḍagu nibhaṁdhamu Oka 1 ṭi prasādamu kuṁca tirumāla kuṁcakunnu
śriṁgirināthanāyuḍu Aḍḍa dēvināyuka AUbhaḷinayuḍu Aḍḍa Ubhayadhūpālānnu
cāmarakolupu koluvanu vīri darmmuga peṭina vaṟukunu kuṁcalu 2
Iṁdulaku śrībhaṁḍaramaṁdu IruvaI māḍalu padmanidhiga peṭṭi pra
sā(ṁ)damu nālu kuṁcālu vritigāṁ koni I kolupulaku Icenu vīru
I prasādamu bhujiṁci ĀcaṁdrārkkasthāIgānu koluvāṁgalāru . I ni
bhaṁddhacamasya Apaṁ viḍiya 1 jitaṁ konakalaru I dharmmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa
śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1080 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
